originalTitle: Proliferate (YC S25) is hiring to building open source Codex
content:
Manage a team of agents from your desktop

Proliferate is building the operating system for modern engineering.

We are building the company in person in SoMa, San Francisco. We care a lot about intensity, craft, and working with people who want to do the best work of their careers. We work hard, and we also take health seriously: company-expensed Whoop, meaningful health and wellness budget, and top-tier insurance.

I (Pablo) finished my master's in AI at 19 and joined Onyx (YC W24) as engineer #1, where I spent a year building enterprise AI search before starting Proliferate. You can see what I shipped there here . We’ll be working closely together.

You’d be one of our first engineering hires and build the core product. This is a high-ownership role across product, systems, and user experience.

We have an extremely small, flat, talent-dense team. We value urgency, taste, truth-seeking, and people who care deeply about the quality and impact of their work.

TypeScript, React, Next.js, Python, Postgres, Redis, AWS, Rust

Top-of-market salary plus meaningful equity, full health/dental/vision, all meals covered, equipment budget, and a monthly health and wellness stipend.

4 short questions through Work at a Startup. Emphasis on short! Should be around 3 sentences max per answer

2. Phone call with Pablo (15 minutes)

A quick call to get to know each other

We’ll talk through a technical problem together with a codebase open on your end

Come to our office by Salesforce Park in SF and we'll try working together. If this isn't possible due to extenuating circumstances, we can make accommodations
chineseTitle: Proliferate (YC S25) 正在招聘人员来构建开源 Codex
chineseContent:
从您的桌面管理代理团队

Proliferate 正在构建现代工程的操作系统。

我们正在旧金山 SoMa 亲自建立公司。我们非常关心强度、工艺以及与那些想要在职业生涯中做出最好的工作的人一起工作。我们努力工作，也认真对待健康：公司费用的 Whoop、有意义的健康和保健预算以及顶级保险。

我 (Pablo) 在 19 岁时完成了人工智能硕士学位，并作为一等工程师加入了 Onyx (YC W24)，在开始 Proliferate 之前，我花了一年时间构建企业人工智能搜索。你可以在这里看到我运送的东西。我们将密切合作。

您将成为我们首批聘用的工程人员之一并构建核心产品。这是一个跨产品、系统和用户体验的高所有权角色。

我们有一个非常小、扁平、人才密集的团队。我们重视紧迫感、品味、求实以及深切关心工作质量和影响的人们。

TypeScript、React、Next.js、Python、Postgres、Redis、AWS、Rust

市场最高的工资加上有意义的股权、全面的健康/牙科/视力、所有膳食、设备预算以及每月的健康和保健津贴。

通过“在初创公司工作”提出 4 个简短问题。强调短！每个答案最多应包含 3 句话左右

2. 与巴勃罗通话（15 分钟）

快速通话以了解彼此

我们将讨论技术问题以及您端开放的代码库

欢迎来到我们位于旧金山 Salesforce Park 的办公室，我们将尝试合作。如果由于特殊情况而无法做到这一点，我们可以提供住宿
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
